551.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mu'adhah bint Abd Allah that Aisha told her she used to bathe with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel.
551.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mu'adzah binti Abd Allah bahwa Aisyah memberitahunya bahwa ia biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu bejana.

552.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'If the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had seen what women have now introduced, he would have forbidden them from the mosque, just as the women of the Children of Israel were forbidden.'
552.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Seandainya Rasulullah ﷺ melihat apa yang sekarang dilakukan oleh para wanita, beliau pasti melarang mereka dari masjid, sebagaimana wanita-wanita Bani Israil dilarang.'

553.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to make the two rak'ahs before Fajr so brief that I would ask myself whether he had recited Surah al-Fatihah in them.'
553.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membuat dua rakaat sebelum Subuh begitu singkat hingga aku bertanya pada diri sendiri apakah beliau membaca Surah Al-Fatihah di dalamnya.'

554.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was in i'tikaf and did not enter the house except for a human need. She washed his head, and between her and him was only the threshold of the door.
554.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sedang beri'tikaf dan tidak masuk ke dalam rumah kecuali untuk keperluan manusiawi. Ia mencuci kepalanya, dan antara dia dan beliau hanya ada ambang pintu.

555.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, when semen got on his garment, would wash the affected part of the garment, then go out to pray — and she could see the mark of the washing on his garment.
555.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ, ketika mani mengenai pakaiannya, mencuci bagian yang terkena pakaian itu, kemudian keluar untuk shalat — dan ia bisa melihat bekas cucian pada pakaiannya.

556.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: he would rise in the middle of the night, perform ablution, enter the mosque, and pray eight rak'ahs with equal recitation, bowing, and prostration. Then he would pray Witr with one rak'ah, then pray two rak'ahs while seated. He would then lay his head down, and sometimes Bilal would come to call him for prayer before he had dozed off — or she was unsure whether he had dozed.
556.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ: beliau bangkit di tengah malam, berwudhu, masuk ke masjid, dan shalat delapan rakaat dengan bacaan, ruku, dan sujud yang seimbang. Kemudian beliau shalat Witr satu rakaat, lalu shalat dua rakaat sambil duduk. Beliau kemudian meletakkan kepalanya, dan terkadang Bilal datang untuk memanggilnya untuk shalat sebelum beliau tertidur — atau ia tidak yakin apakah beliau tertidur.

557.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: it totaled eleven rak'ahs. When he grew heavy, he reduced the nine rak'ahs to seven, then prayed two rak'ahs seated. This remained his prayer until Allah took him.
557.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ: berjumlah sebelas rakaat. Ketika beliau menjadi lebih berat, beliau mengurangi sembilan rakaat menjadi tujuh, kemudian shalat dua rakaat sambil duduk. Inilah yang menjadi shalatnya hingga Allah mengambilnya.

558.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'Whoever loves to meet Allah, Allah loves to meet him. And whoever hates to meet Allah, Allah hates to meet him. And death comes before the meeting with Allah.'
558.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Barang siapa yang mencintai pertemuan dengan Allah, Allah pun mencintai pertemuan dengannya. Dan barang siapa yang membenci pertemuan dengan Allah, Allah pun membenci pertemuan dengannya. Kematian datang sebelum pertemuan dengan Allah.'

559.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the character of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with his family. She replied: 'He had the best character of all people. He was never indecent, never acted indecently, never shouted in the markets, and did not return evil with evil — rather he would forgive and overlook.'
559.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang akhlak Rasulullah ﷺ dengan keluarganya. Ia menjawab: 'Beliau memiliki akhlak terbaik di antara semua orang. Beliau tidak pernah berbuat keji, tidak pernah bertindak tidak senonoh, tidak pernah berteriak-teriak di pasar, dan tidak membalas kejahatan dengan kejahatan — melainkan beliau memaafkan dan mengampuni.'

560.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wanted to enter the state of ihram, he would anoint himself with the best oil he could find — until I could see the gleam of the oil in his hair. And I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He would then send them off, and he did not avoid any of us women.'
560.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ ingin memasuki keadaan ihram, beliau mengolesi dirinya dengan minyak terbaik yang bisa beliau temukan — hingga aku bisa melihat kilau minyak di rambutnya. Dan aku biasa menganyam kalung untuk hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ. Beliau kemudian mengirimnya, dan beliau tidak menghindari satu pun dari kami para wanita.'

561.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed sitting. She replied: 'He would pray part of the night sitting for a long time and part of the night standing for a long time. When he recited standing, he would bow standing. And when he recited sitting, he would bow sitting.'
561.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ shalat sambil duduk. Ia menjawab: 'Beliau shalat sebagian malam sambil duduk lama dan sebagian malam sambil berdiri lama. Ketika beliau membaca sambil berdiri, beliau ruku sambil berdiri. Dan ketika beliau membaca sambil duduk, beliau ruku sambil duduk.'

562.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I was the first to ask the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about this.' He said: 'That was Jibril. I have never seen him in his original form in which he was created except twice. I saw him descending from the sky, his immense frame filling the space between the heavens and the earth.'
562.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Akulah yang pertama kali bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang ini.' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu adalah Jibril. Aku tidak pernah melihatnya dalam bentuk aslinya yang ia diciptakan dengannya kecuali dua kali. Aku melihatnya turun dari langit, dengan sosok besarnya memenuhi ruang antara langit dan bumi.'

563.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) through Mu'adhah that she said: 'Order your husbands to wash themselves after relieving themselves and urinating — for I feel shy telling them this directly — and indeed the Prophet ﷺ used to do this.'
563.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) melalui Mu'adzah bahwa ia berkata: 'Perintahkanlah suami-suami kalian untuk mencuci diri mereka setelah buang air besar dan kencing — karena aku malu menyampaikannya langsung kepada mereka — dan sesungguhnya Nabi ﷺ biasa melakukan ini.'

564.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ bathed from ritual impurity, he would begin by performing ablution as for prayer, wash his private parts and feet, and wipe his hand on the wall. Then he would pour water over himself — and I could see the trace of his hand on the wall.'
564.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ mandi dari janabah, beliau memulai dengan berwudhu sebagaimana wudhu untuk shalat, mencuci kemaluannya dan kakinya, dan mengusapkan tangannya pada dinding. Kemudian beliau menuangkan air ke atas dirinya — dan aku bisa melihat bekas tangannya pada dinding.'

565.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ never left in his house anything with a cross pattern without cutting it off.
565.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak pernah membiarkan sesuatu yang bermotif salib di rumahnya tanpa memotongnya.

566.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked how the Prophet ﷺ began when he entered his home and what he ended with. She replied: 'He would begin with the toothstick and end with the two rak'ahs of Fajr.'
566.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya bagaimana Nabi ﷺ memulai ketika masuk ke rumahnya dan apa yang diakhirinya. Ia menjawab: 'Beliau memulai dengan siwak dan mengakhiri dengan dua rakaat Subuh.'

567.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away with his armor pawned for thirty sa' of barley.'
567.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ wafat dengan baju besinya digadaikan sebagai jaminan untuk tiga puluh sha' gandum.'

568.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ ruled that the earnings of a purchased item belong to the buyer who bore the liability.
568.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memutuskan bahwa penghasilan barang yang dibeli adalah milik pembeli yang menanggung risikonya.

569.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ took her hand and pointed to the moon, saying: 'O Aisha, seek refuge in Allah from the evil of this, for this is al-Ghasiq when it darkens.'
569.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengambil tangannya dan menunjuk ke bulan, bersabda: 'Wahai Aisyah, berlindunglah kepada Allah dari kejahatan ini, karena inilah al-Ghasiq ketika ia gelap.'

570.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The child belongs to the marital bed, and the adulterer gets nothing.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then commanded Sawda bint Zam'ah to veil herself from the boy because of the resemblance he saw to Utbah. And she never saw him until she met Allah.
570.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Anak itu milik tempat tidur pernikahan, dan pezina hanya mendapat kehinaan.' Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan Saudah binti Zam'ah untuk berhijab dari anak itu karena kemiripan yang beliau lihat dengan Utbah. Dan ia tidak pernah melihatnya hingga ia bertemu Allah.

571.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked: 'How did the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pray the two rak'ahs while sitting?' She replied: 'He would recite in them while sitting. When he wanted to bow, he would stand and then bow.'
571.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya: 'Bagaimana Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dua rakaat sambil duduk?' Ia menjawab: 'Beliau membaca di dalamnya sambil duduk. Ketika ingin ruku, beliau berdiri kemudian ruku.'

572.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would sleep while in a state of ritual impurity. She replied: 'Yes — but he would not sleep until he had washed his private parts and performed ablution as for prayer.'
572.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ tidur dalam keadaan junub. Ia menjawab: 'Ya — tetapi beliau tidak tidur hingga mencuci kemaluannya dan berwudhu sebagaimana wudhu untuk shalat.'

573.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'There would sometimes be months when no smoke was seen coming from the homes of the family of the Prophet ﷺ.' She was asked: 'O mother, what was their food?' She replied: 'The two black things — water and dates. But the Prophet ﷺ had sincere neighbors from the Ansar who had milking animals, and they would send milk to him.'
573.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Terkadang ada berbulan-bulan di mana tidak terlihat asap keluar dari rumah-rumah keluarga Nabi ﷺ.' Ia ditanya: 'Wahai ibu, apa makanan mereka?' Ia menjawab: 'Dua hal yang hitam — air dan kurma. Tetapi Nabi ﷺ memiliki tetangga-tetangga yang tulus dari Anshar yang memiliki hewan-hewan perah, dan mereka biasa mengirim susu kepada beliau.'

574.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Zaynab bint Jahsh suffered from prolonged bleeding in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded her to take a full bath before each prayer. She would enter a basin filled with water and immerse herself in it — until the water would be reddened.
574.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Zainab binti Jahsy mengalami pendarahan berkepanjangan di zaman Rasulullah ﷺ. Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk mandi besar sebelum setiap shalat. Ia biasa masuk ke dalam baskom yang berisi air dan mencelupkan dirinya ke dalamnya — hingga airnya menjadi kemerahan.

575.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to perfume the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he entered the state of ihram and when he came out of it.'
575.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beliau memasuki keadaan ihram dan ketika beliau keluar darinya.'

576.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'She was her father's daughter indeed.' When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon them and they mentioned the matter to him, he said: 'Make up for it with a day in its place.'
576.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ia memang benar-benar putri ayahnya.' Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ masuk menemui mereka dan mereka menyebutkan masalah itu kepadanya, beliau bersabda: 'Gantilah dengan satu hari sebagai penggantinya.'

577.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she denied something, and when she saw the Prophet ﷺ she told him. He said: 'No.' Then the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to us afterward: 'It has been revealed to me that you will be tried in your graves.'
577.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyangkal sesuatu, dan ketika ia melihat Nabi ﷺ ia memberitahunya. Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak.' Kemudian Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada kami setelah itu: 'Telah diwahyukan kepadaku bahwa kalian akan diuji di kubur kalian.'

578.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I twisted the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with my own hands. He sent them off and remained, not abandoning anything he used to do.'
578.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku menganyam kalung untuk hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dengan tanganku sendiri. Beliau mengirimnya dan tetap tinggal, tidak meninggalkan apa pun yang biasa beliau lakukan.'

579.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a leather pouch with beads was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he divided them equally between the free woman and the slave woman.
579.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa sebuah kantong kulit berisi manik-manik dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau membaginya secara merata antara wanita merdeka dan budak perempuan.

580.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never prayed the Duha prayer voluntarily at all — but I pray it.'
580.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah shalat Dhuha secara sukarela sama sekali — namun aku shalat Dhuha.'

581.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The snake is wicked, the scorpion is wicked, and the crow is wicked.'
581.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ular itu fasiq, kalajengking itu fasiq, dan gagak itu fasiq.'

582.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Jibril kept recommending to me the rights of the neighbor until I thought he would make him an heir.'
582.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril terus-menerus berpesan kepadaku tentang hak tetangga hingga aku mengira ia akan menjadikannya sebagai ahli waris.'

583.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "Indeed the toothstick purifies the mouth and pleases the Lord."'
583.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Sesungguhnya siwak itu mensucikan mulut dan mendapat keridhaan Tuhan."'

584.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the recitation in the two rak'ahs before Fajr. She replied: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to recite quietly in them — and she mentioned Surah al-Kafirun and Surah al-Ikhlas.'
584.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang bacaan dalam dua rakaat sebelum Subuh. Ia menjawab: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa membaca dengan suara pelan di dalamnya — dan ia menyebutkan Surah Al-Kafirun dan Surah Al-Ikhlas.'

585.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'No girl among them who has reached puberty should pray without a head covering. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon me when a young girl was present, and he threw his waist-wrap to me and said: "Divide it between this girl and the girl at Umm Salama's — for I believe they have both, or she has, reached puberty."'
585.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada seorang gadis di antara mereka yang telah mencapai usia haid yang boleh shalat tanpa penutup kepala. Rasulullah ﷺ masuk menemuiku ketika ada seorang gadis muda di sana, dan beliau melemparkan kain pinggangnya kepadaku dan bersabda: "Bagilah ini antara gadis ini dan gadis yang ada di tempat Umm Salamah — karena aku percaya mereka berdua, atau ia, telah mencapai usia haid."'

586.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I perfumed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with my own hands when he entered the state of ihram, and I also perfumed him at Mina before he performed the Tawaf of Visiting.'
586.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ dengan tanganku sendiri ketika beliau memasuki keadaan ihram, dan aku juga memewangikannya di Mina sebelum beliau melakukan Tawaf Ziyarah.'

587.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ raised his head toward the sky and said to her: 'Did you fear that Allah and His Messenger would wrong you?' She said: 'I thought you had gone to visit one of your wives.' He said: 'Indeed Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, descends on the night of the middle of Sha'ban to the lowest heaven and forgives more people than the number of hairs on the sheep of the Banu Kalb.'
587.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengangkat kepalanya ke langit dan berkata kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu takut bahwa Allah dan Rasul-Nya akan berbuat zalim kepadamu?' Ia berkata: 'Aku kira engkau pergi mengunjungi salah satu istrimu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung turun pada malam pertengahan Sya'ban ke langit dunia dan mengampuni lebih banyak orang dari jumlah rambut domba Bani Kalb.'

588.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) through Safiyyah bint Shayba that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform ablution with about a mudd of water and bathe with about a sa'.
588.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) melalui Shafiyyah binti Syaibah bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berwudhu dengan sekitar satu mudd air dan mandi dengan sekitar satu sha'.

589.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Every group of people has a source of strength, and the source of strength for Quraysh is their freed clients.'
589.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setiap kaum memiliki sumber kekuatan, dan sumber kekuatan Quraisy adalah para mantan budak yang dimerdekakan mereka.'

590.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say: "O Allah, make me of those who, when they do good, rejoice; and when they do wrong, seek forgiveness."'
590.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan: "Ya Allah, jadikanlah aku termasuk orang-orang yang ketika berbuat baik, mereka bersukacita; dan ketika berbuat salah, mereka memohon ampun."'

591.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray four rak'ahs before Dhuhr and two rak'ahs after it, and two rak'ahs before Fajr. He would say: "What excellent surahs they are" — meaning Surah al-Kafirun and Surah al-Ikhlas recited in the two rak'ahs before Fajr.'
591.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat empat rakaat sebelum Zuhur dan dua rakaat setelahnya, serta dua rakaat sebelum Subuh. Beliau biasa berkata: "Sungguh bagus kedua surah itu" — maksudnya Surah Al-Kafirun dan Surah Al-Ikhlas yang dibaca dalam dua rakaat sebelum Subuh.'

592.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave us the choice, and we chose him — so we did not consider it a divorce.'
592.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberi kami pilihan, dan kami memilih beliau — maka kami tidak menganggap itu sebagai talak.'

593.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to scrape semen off the garment of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
593.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa mengikis mani dari pakaian Rasulullah ﷺ.'

594.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'When the two circumcised parts meet, a ritual bath becomes obligatory.'
594.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Ketika dua bagian yang dikhitan bertemu, maka mandi besar menjadi wajib.'

595.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I said: O Messenger of Allah ﷺ, I have two neighbors — which of them should I give a gift to?' He said: 'The one whose door is closer to yours.'
595.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku berkata: Wahai Rasulullah ﷺ, aku memiliki dua tetangga — yang mana dari keduanya yang harus aku beri hadiah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Yang pintunya lebih dekat denganmu.'

596.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that it was mentioned to the Prophet ﷺ that people disliked facing the qiblah when relieving themselves. He said: 'Have they really done that? Turn my seat toward the qiblah.'
596.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa disebutkan kepada Nabi ﷺ bahwa orang-orang tidak suka menghadap kiblat ketika buang air. Beliau bersabda: 'Benarkah mereka melakukan itu? Putar tempat dudukku ke arah kiblat.'

597.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'The one who is skilled in the Quran will be with the noble, righteous scribes. And the one who recites it with difficulty — for him there are two rewards.'
597.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Orang yang mahir dalam Al-Qur'an akan bersama para malaikat yang mulia lagi taat. Dan orang yang membacanya dengan susah payah — baginya dua pahala.'

598.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'O Aisha, were it not that your people are new to leaving disbelief, I would have commanded that the House be demolished, included what was excluded from it, leveled it with the ground, and given it two doors — an eastern door and a western door — and thus reached the foundations of Ibrahim, peace be upon him. But they were unable to build it that way.'
598.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Aisyah, seandainya bukan karena kaummu baru saja meninggalkan kekafiran, aku pasti akan memerintahkan agar Ka'bah dibongkar, dimasukkan apa yang dikeluarkan darinya, diratakan dengan tanah, dan diberi dua pintu — pintu timur dan pintu barat — dan dengan demikian mencapai pondasi Ibrahim 'alaihissalam. Tetapi mereka tidak mampu membangunnya dengan cara itu.'

599.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she came to Amir ibn Fuhayra and asked: 'O Amir, how do you feel?' He said: 'I found death before tasting it — the coward meets his doom from above.' Then she came to Bilal and asked: 'O Bilal, how do you feel?' He said: 'Would that I knew whether I would spend a night at Fakhkh, surrounded by idhkhir and jalil grass.' She came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and informed him. He said: 'O Allah, bless us in our sa' and our mudd, and make Madinah beloved to us as you made Makkah beloved.'
599.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia datang kepada Amir bin Fuhairah dan bertanya: 'Wahai Amir, bagaimana rasamu?' Ia berkata: 'Aku menemukan kematian sebelum merasakannya — pengecut bertemu ajalnya dari atas.' Kemudian ia datang kepada Bilal dan bertanya: 'Wahai Bilal, bagaimana rasamu?' Ia berkata: 'Andai aku tahu apakah aku akan melewati malam di Fakhkh, dikelilingi oleh rumput idzkhir dan jalil.' Ia datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan memberitahunya. Beliau bersabda: 'Ya Allah, berkahilah kami dalam sha' dan mudd kami, dan jadikanlah Madinah dicintai kami sebagaimana Engkau jadikan Makkah dicintai kami.'

600.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ described three records: a record that Allah disregards entirely, a record that Allah will not leave unaddressed, and a record that Allah will not forgive. The record that Allah will not forgive is shirk — associating partners with Allah. The record that Allah disregards entirely is the wrongdoing of a servant against himself in matters between him and his Lord — like a fast he missed or a prayer he missed — for Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, will forgive that.
600.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menggambarkan tiga catatan: catatan yang Allah abaikan sepenuhnya, catatan yang Allah tidak akan biarkan tanpa penyelesaian, dan catatan yang Allah tidak akan ampuni. Catatan yang Allah tidak akan ampuni adalah syirik — menyekutukan Allah. Catatan yang Allah abaikan sepenuhnya adalah kezaliman seorang hamba terhadap dirinya sendiri dalam hal-hal antara dia dan Tuhannya — seperti puasa yang dia tinggalkan atau shalat yang dia tinggalkan — karena Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung akan mengampuni itu.
